# OnHalfUnfinishedKeyPairOperation

###

Related Doc: [package acceptPartialFunctions](<package.html>)

[ ](<../../../../../../../../index.html#org.apache.flink.api.scala.extensions.impl.acceptPartialFunctions.OnHalfUnfinishedKeyPairOperation> "Permalink")

####  class OnHalfUnfinishedKeyPairOperation[L, R, O] extends AnyRef

Wraps an half unfinished key pair operation, allowing to use anonymous partial functions to perform extraction of items in a tuple, case class instance or collection

L


The type of the left data set items

R


The type of the right data set items

O


The type of the output data set items

Linear Supertypes

AnyRef, Any

Initiates a join or co-group operation, defining the second half of the where clause with an equality over the right data set items.

Initiates a join or co-group operation, defining the second half of the where clause with an equality over the right data set items.

K


The type of the key, for which type information must be known

fun


The function that defines the equality of the where clause

returns


A data set of Os
